overview: Green Harvest Farm is a modern, responsive marketing website for a sustainable farm business. It features a hero section, education programs, byproduct showcase, achievements, testimonials, team profiles, and a contact form — all styled with earthy greens, browns, and beiges.
features: Hero section with 'Growing Fresh, Sustainable, and Smart' tagline and CTA buttons
Education section with workshops, farming guides, and school partnerships
Byproducts showcase with organic fertilizers, compost, milk, and eggs
Achievements section with awards, certifications, and community stats
About Us with farm story, mission/vision, and team profiles
Contact form with validation and social media links
Mobile-responsive earthy design with smooth animations
